steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The question asks for data describing a similar pattern in sunshine hours from April to September for Anchorage and Fairbanks. The decisive clue is the phrase 'similar pattern', which suggests we need a choice showing identical directional trends (increase/decrease) over time in both cities within the specified timeframe.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B captures the shared trend, showing increases from April to June followed by declines from June to September in both cities. The other three choices either describe numerical thresholds unrelated to the pattern (C/D) or misalign with the timeframe or directional flow (A). That matches choice B — B is correct.
